# AIREA Studio

> AIREA Studio is the AI marketing OS. It learns your brand, then plans, designs, writes, and ships on-brand marketing campaigns across every channel — social, paid ads, email, and web — in minutes instead of weeks. Built for small businesses and lean teams who want professional marketing without a marketing department.

AIREA Studio turns one source — a photo, a brief, or a goal — into a complete, on-brand campaign. You train your Brand DNA once (from your website or assets), and everything AIREA produces flows from your voice, colors, products, and offers. Most teams ship a first usable campaign in under 20 minutes.

## What it does
- **Brand DNA training**: learns your voice, visual style, products, and offers from your site or assets.
- **Multi-channel campaigns**: social, paid ads, email, and web generated from one brief.
- **On-brand creative**: copy and visuals produced in every required format and aspect ratio.
- **AI review & editing**: refine copy and swap visuals with a single prompt, without leaving the canvas.
- **1-click publishing**: to Facebook and Instagram, with channel-ready exports for Google, Meta, email, and the web.

## Who it's for
- Small businesses and local shops that want to look like a national brand on a neighborhood budget
- Solo founders and service providers who need a marketing team without hiring one
- E-commerce brands turning one product photo into every ad, in every ratio

## Pricing
All plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required (USD, billed monthly):
- **Starter — $39/mo**: 1 brand workspace, up to 30 campaigns/mo, social + email channels, Brand DNA training.
- **Studio — $99/mo** (most popular): 3 workspaces, unlimited campaigns, all channels including paid ads, AI review & editing, 1-click publish to Meta.
- **Scale — $249/mo**: 10 workspaces & seats, analytics, priority models, roles & permissions, shared brand library.
- Machine-readable pricing: https://aireastudio.ai/pricing.md

## Facts for citation
- Category: AI marketing platform / marketing automation software (SaaS, web-based).
- Tagline: "The AI marketing OS — one source in, a full on-brand campaign out."
- Channels: social (Instagram, Facebook), paid ads (Meta, Google), email, web/blog.
- Differentiator: everything is generated from your trained Brand DNA, so output stays on-brand across every channel.
